name: subagent-model-routing-codex
description: Codex-native model routing workflow for flat external-model dispatch and dependency workflows over local codex/opencode shims.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex work through local codex/opencode shims.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native companion to the Claude Code subagent-model-routing plugin. It keeps flat dispatch and dependency-workflow guidance in Codex terms without loading Claude-only commands, agents, hooks, or Workflow instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use model routing for this task.
Plan a dependency workflow across models.
